turns.content: Socrate e om. Toti oamenii sunt muritori.
Este Socrate muritor?

description: All birds fly, penguins are birds — expects nuanced answer

turns.content: All birds can fly. A penguin is a bird.
Can a penguin fly?

description: Transitive property — A>B, B>C, is A>C?

turns.content: Iron is heavier than wood. Wood is heavier than paper.
Is iron heavier than paper?
No mammals are fish. A whale is a mammal.
Is a whale a fish?

description: Three-step chain — A implies B, B implies C, C implies D

turns.content: All cats are animals. All animals need water. Everything that needs water needs food.
Does a cat need food?

description: Contrapositive — if it rains the ground is wet

turns.content: If it rains, the ground gets wet. The ground is not wet.
Is it raining?

description: Disjunctive syllogism — either A or B, not A

turns.content: The server runs either Linux or Windows. It does not run Windows.
What OS does the server run?

description: Set membership — all X in set Y, Z is X

turns.content: All prime numbers greater than 2 are odd. 7 is a prime number greater than 2.
Is 7 odd?

description: Hypothetical syllogism — if A then B, if B then C

turns.content: If the temperature drops below zero, water freezes. If water freezes, pipes can burst.
What happens to pipes if the temperature drops below zero?

description: Universal negative — no reptiles are warm-blooded

turns.content: No reptiles are warm-blooded. A lizard is a reptile.
Is a lizard warm-blooded?
